description_short: AI-enhanced PCAP analysis with Condition Orange support.
description_long: Wraps all static PCAP analysis and threat hunt tools with LLM intelligence. Provides three analysis tiers: triage (SOC Tier 1/2 prioritization and C2 beacon hunting), threat hunt (MITRE ATT&CK mapping, hypothesis generation, evidence gathering), and reporting (executive summary, IOC extraction, shift handover). Includes OT/ICS-specific modes (ot_triage, ot_threat_hunt, ot_report) that use a specialized ICS security analyst persona with MITRE ATT&CK for ICS mapping, Purdue Model zone violation detection, safety impact assessment, and IEC 62443 compliance evaluation. OT modes analyze Modbus, DNP3, S7comm, EtherNet/IP-CIP, OPC-UA, BACnet, IEC-104 protocol data and cleartext credential exposure. Network Operations modes (netops_triage, netops_health, netops_report) focus on network performance, infrastructure health, and operational issues — analyzing TCP retransmissions, RST patterns, zero-window events, ICMP errors, IP fragmentation, TTL anomalies, DNS health, and capacity indicators. Supports Condition Orange mode for heightened alert investigations where false negatives are more costly than false positives. If a markdown or text file is loaded in the session (via 'load notes.md'), its content is automatically injected into the prompt as INVESTIGATION CONTEXT. Network reference files loaded with 'load --networks ipam.md' provide subnet-to-zone mappings that override port-based heuristics in the Purdue traffic flow graph.
author: Event Mill Contributors
